verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence first; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord. Move codes to expired only when expiry evidence is strong.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML dateModified is 07/16/2026, identifies Sailor Piece by Shadowrise Devs, max level 20000, and directly lists NEW CODES: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW. It does not expose rewards, per-code level requirements, ascension gates, or expiry proof for older codes.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public invite page confirms the official Shadowrise Devs Sailor Piece server and member count, but it requires JavaScript/login for channel messages and did not expose code-list posts, so it was not direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board JSON
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Board JSON remained public; dateLastActivity stayed 2026-06-12T02:16:43.308Z. It contains general progression cards and mentions codes in tips, but no current July active-code list, so Trello was not decisive current code proof.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct status 200 after clearing proxies. Updated July 5, 2026 and checked July 4. Active list still has KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, and BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE; page says official Discord code-list is the best place to find codes. It lists several retained older codes as expired.

sources.name: Pocket Tactics Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct status 200 after clearing proxies. Updated and checked July 13, 2026. Visible active list has six codes: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, and 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, with rewards matching the retained newer-code rewards. It lists several retained older codes as expired or omits them.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct status 200 after clearing proxies. Page says it was updated June 15, 2026 with King Update codes including KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW. Visible source context says new codes are posted in the official Discord game-announcements channel. It supports several retained older active codes, but conflicts by expiring some June codes.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct status 200 after clearing proxies. Last updated July 2, 2026 and says no new codes were found. Current active list has 10 codes and explicit level gates: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED 12,500, RAIDUPDATENOW 9,000, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2 12,500, MASTERY/GHOULUPDATE/RAIDS 7,500, and SMALLDELAYCODESORRY/FREECODEFORYALL/BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON 12,500. It marks several retained June/May codes expired.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct status 200 after clearing proxies. Visible list supports a broad 12-code active set including the June 9 group, FREECODEFORYALLL2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG base/2/3, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and FREECODEFORYALL. Its reward bundles for KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, and FREECODEFORYALLL2 conflict with stronger source agreement.

sources.name: G2A News Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct curl returned 403 after clearing proxy variables, but current web snapshot was crawled today and dated July 1, 2026. It lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, and BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE as NEW with rewards matching the retained newer-code values.

sources.name: Mobalytics Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct curl returned 403 after clearing proxy variables, but current web snapshot was crawled today and updated July 2, 2026. It lists six working codes: 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, FREECODEFORYALLL3, KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, and RAIDUPDATENOW with rewards matching retained values.

sources.name: U7BUY Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct status 200 after clearing proxies. June 15, 2026 page says it compiled newest codes from official Discord announcements and manually verified them. It lists all 16 retained active codes plus several old or new-server-only codes, so it supports retaining conflict codes but is not direct Discord evidence.

sources.name: Sailor Piece Wiki Codes
sources.notes: Direct curl returned 403 after clearing proxy variables, but current web snapshot was accessible. It lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, and RAIDS as active, but conflicts on SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG status and adds Ascension IV requirements not confirmed by official/in-game evidence.

sources.name: Radio Times Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct status 200 after clearing proxies. Published June 15, 2026 and lists a broad working set including the two Roblox NEW CODES, the June milestone group, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, and HUGEUPDATEWWW. It also has internal active/expired conflicts, so it was supplementary only.

decisions.reason: Official Roblox still directly lists only KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW under NEW CODES. No new official code string was found in accessible official sources or current credible third-party pages.

Official Roblox lists it under NEW CODES. Rewards match Beebom, Pocket Tactics, G2A search evidence, Mobalytics, U7BUY, and indexed Fandom evidence. PCGamesN reward text conflicts and was not used alone. Fandom adds Ascension IV, but no official/in-game evidence confirmed an ascension gate.

Official Roblox lists it under NEW CODES and rewards match multiple current sources. GamesRadar still supports level 9,000; Fandom conflicts with level 12,500 plus Ascension IV, but this was not official enough to change the Level Eligibility Filter.

Beebom, Pocket Tactics, G2A search evidence, Mobalytics, PCGamesN, U7BUY, Radio Times, and indexed Fandom evidence list these active/current; Pro Game Guides and GamesRadar list some expired/inactive. No official expiry proof was accessible.

Pocket Tactics, Mobalytics, PCGamesN, U7BUY, Radio Times, and indexed Fandom evidence list it active/current; Beebom, Pro Game Guides, and GamesRadar list it expired/inactive. No official expiry proof was accessible.

U7BUY lists it active and says the list came from official Discord announcements plus manual verification; PCGamesN also lists it active/current. Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, and GamesRadar list it expired/inactive. Direct Discord messages were not publicly accessible.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, U7BUY, Radio Times, and indexed Fandom support much of this set as active/current; Beebom/Pocket Tactics/PCGamesN omissions or conflicts remain for parts. No official expiry proof was accessible.

U7BUY, PCGamesN, and indexed Fandom evidence list it active/current; Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, and GamesRadar list it expired/inactive. Kept active because official expiry proof was not accessible.

No active code had direct official expiry proof. Current third-party expiry agreement is stronger for some older codes, but active evidence remains from current pages or U7BUY official-Discord/manual-verification claims.

GamesRadar remains the only current source with broad explicit level gates for the 10-code subset. Fandom adds Ascension IV or different levels for some codes, but this is not official/in-game evidence. The site data model only supports min_level, so no component logic was changed.

source_conflicts.conflict: GamesRadar lists level 9,000, while Fandom lists level 12,500 plus Ascension IV. Official Roblox does not publish the per-code level gate.
source_conflicts.next_step: Change the Level Eligibility Filter only if accessible official/in-game evidence or stronger current-source agreement contradicts GamesRadar.

source_conflicts.conflict: Fandom adds Ascension IV requirements; official Roblox and current third-party source pages used for rewards do not confirm ascension gates.
source_conflicts.next_step: Add ascension filtering only after official/in-game evidence or a schema change decision.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN lists reward bundles for KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW that conflict with Roblox-supported Beebom/Pocket Tactics/G2A/Mobalytics/U7BUY/Fandom reward agreement.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not change rewards from PCGamesN alone; require official/in-game evidence or broader current-source agreement.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom, Pocket Tactics, G2A search evidence, Mobalytics, PCGamesN, U7BUY, Radio Times, and indexed Fandom support the June 9/King update group; Pro Game Guides and GamesRadar mark some expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official expiry proof appears or active support drops below the automation threshold.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, U7BUY, Radio Times, and indexed Fandom support much of the retained May set; Beebom, Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN omission, or Fandom status conflicts exist for parts.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not expire based on conflicting third-party pages without official proof or broader current agreement.
